title: Greenish swords
description: Minecraft resource pack that adds some interesting swords by renaming vanilla items
body:
### Greenish swords
Very sharp Resource pack that adds large number of unusual swords to the game!
All content is presented in the form of **renaming** vanilla items. for work requered **Optifine** or its analogs
- A lot of swords
> ![A lot of swords](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8aa868787af4e070968296d88dc5893c94e1da01_0.webp)
- Four variants of one sword
> ![Four variations of one sword ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ef5e9d6f5e2846968cd2cb496f1684c66d501f4e.png)
- Renaming swords
> ![Renaming sword](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9b736cbda73e28dda33b14ed2d840c8249d3605e.png)
### ﻿[List of swords](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1tX31vr18KBMK4UT0grkXS1eVoABlGYzn/view?usp=sharing)
### [Список мечей](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1yYIr3YZB-aI8dFgxmu3Ua3RhWSQCFLe7/view?usp=sharing)
